notes: summary_exact_cpu uses cat=user_annotation only; this is the main inclusive CPU wall-time view.
summary_exact_gpu_user_annotation keeps Kineto gpu_user_annotation copies separate so child ranges are not double-counted.
Baseline path keeps TORCHTITAN_MORI_AITER_ASSUME_IDENTICAL_DISPATCH_ORDER=0 to expose total_recv.item and get_dispatch_src_token_pos syncs.
